notes:
🎉 Major Update v1.0.2 - Enhanced Security & Performance!

✅ SECURITY FIXES:
• Fixed critical system vulnerability (invalid opponent games)
• Eliminated duplicate transaction issues
• Enhanced bot system with 10 intelligent bot types
• Implemented comprehensive fraud prevention

✅ PERFORMANCE IMPROVEMENTS:
• Fixed rapid transaction issues (10-second cooldown)
• Added multi-layer rate limiting protection
• Enhanced wallet security with duplicate prevention
• Improved game validation and integrity checks

✅ BOT SYSTEM OVERHAUL:
• 7 intelligent winning bots (100% human-like behavior)
• 3 normal bots with random patterns
• Complete random card shuffling (no seed logic)
• Enhanced bot rotation and variety

✅ STABILITY ENHANCEMENTS:
• Real-time transaction monitoring
• Automatic game validation
• Enhanced error handling
• Improved user experience

This update ensures fair gameplay, secure transactions, and optimal performance. All known exploits have been patched.
